title: Delivery zones
intro: Draw the polygons where you deliver. The flat delivery fee and minimum order live on the main {link} page and apply to all zones.

zones.title: Zones
zones.description: Click a zone to highlight it on the map.

empty.title: No delivery zones yet
empty.description: Click + New, then click on the map to add vertices. Double-click or press Enter to close the polygon.

confirmRemove.title: Remove zone
confirmRemove.description: Remove "{name}"? The polygon will be permanently deleted.
